results.query: Elysium Health team leadership advisory board

results.title: Our Team
results.content:
We tackle challenges with creativity, integrity, and a willingness to collaborate. We believe that aging is not only the greatest risk factor for all major chronic conditions, but that aging research represents the most significant opportunity to improve human health today. It is our responsibility to share the benefits of aging research with as many people as possible, to effect real and meaningful change. This includes our colleagues, our families, and our friends—who were the original inspiration for Elysium.

We are solving some of the world’s most interesting and important problems, and believe no one should assume that because a problem is hard, it’s unsolvable.

## Leadership Team

 ### Eric Marcotulli

  CEO
 ### Dan Alminana

  COO

results.title: Scientific Advisory Board
results.content:
Advisory board

# Accelerating the Pace of Discovery.

### Our Scientific Advisory Board is a network of more than 25 world-renowned researchers and clinicians, including Nobel Prize-winning scientists, who guide the scientific direction of our company.

## How We Work Together

Our board guides the scientific direction of Elysium. Its members are leaders in science and technology, pioneering a better approach to health. Rather than endorsing a specific product, this network of scientists, clinicians and health professionals advises the Elysium team on product identification and development, clinical studies, and ongoing research.

   Image 34### Scientific Direction  
   Image 35### Product Discovery  
   Image 36### Institutional Connections  

## Nobel Laureates [...] Epidemiology and Nutrition, Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health  
   Image 64### Ajit Varki

Cellular & Molecular Medicine, UC San Diego School of Medicine

# Eric Marcotulli

CEO

Eric Marcotulli, Elysium Health co-founder and chief executive officer, graduated from Harvard Business School and joined Sequoia Capital as an investment partner. While in Silicon Valley, Marcotulli realized that despite the significant, positive impact of new technologies on our understanding of health and disease, there remained a lack of innovation in the consumer-facing portion of the healthcare market. [...] With a keen interest in aging research and its potential to have a profound impact on the most important areas of health, he created a company focused on developing compelling compounds found in nature that support long-term health.

 Choosing a selection results in a full page refresh.

# Eric Marcotulli

CEO

Eric Marcotulli, Elysium Health co-founder and chief executive officer, graduated from Harvard Business School and joined Sequoia Capital as an investment partner. While in Silicon Valley, Marcotulli realized that despite the significant, positive impact of new technologies on our understanding of health and disease, there remained a lack of innovation in the consumer-facing portion of the healthcare market. [...] With a keen interest in aging research and its potential to have a profound impact on the most important areas of health, he created a company focused on developing compelling compounds found in nature that support long-term health.
